rationale: C20 next_cycle_plan called for bug hunt C20 + HubAntre visual refresh. Bug hunt C20: verified JourneyMapDisplay _process() and _classify_event — 0 bugs found, frame cost acceptable, event classification complete. Feature: Added compact faction reputation dashboard to HubAntre hub screen — 5 color-coded faction mini-bars with tier abbreviations (H=Honore/S=Sympathisant/N=Neutre/M=Mefiant/X=Hostile), Anam cross-run currency counter, equipped Runes display. CRT-styled with semi-transparent deep bg, terminal font, responsive mobile/desktop layout. Live updates via reputation_changed signal. Animated fade-in during hub entry sequence.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C21 (verify HubAntre dashboard doesn't overlap with hotspots on small viewports, test _update_dashboard_data null safety). Then feature: Biome selector maturity indicators — show biome unlock status and maturity score in the radial/selection UI, so the player knows which biomes are available and how progressed they are.
